steps.title: Identify what the blank must show
steps.content: The colon and the word “exemplify” show that Morris's repudiation of industrialization must be clearly evident in the handmade materials—they're proof of his anti-industrial stance.

steps.title: Pick the word that shows this relationship
steps.content: ”Manifest in” means “is clearly evident in,” capturing how Morris's anti-industrial stance is displayed through the handmade materials. The other three suggest ignorance, create illogical relations, or imply complication—none fit how the materials exemplify his stance. That matches choice B — B is correct.
